---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Describe the feature**
A clear description of what you'd like to see.

**Why is it needed?**
Explain the problem or use case this feature would solve.

**Proposed solution**
How you imagine it working.

**Additional context**
Any screenshots, references, or alternatives you've considered.
